389801252.author: cod.ybrendan
389801252.title: Account got Wrongfully Disabled
389801252.body:
I’m giving Instagram 1 star based on my personal experience with account restrictions and suspensions. My original account of all my memories and connections and followers and school organizations was wrongfully disabled, and when I tried to create a new one, it kept getting flagged as well, which made it really difficult to stay on the platform. 

What’s been the hardest part is not just losing access, but losing all the memories connected to my account. Over time, my Instagram became a place where I kept important milestones, conversations, and connections with friends and people I care about. It honestly feels like a digital part of my life just got cut off.

I understand platforms need safety systems and rules, but the process feels very automated and unclear, and it’s hard to know what went wrong or how to properly fix it. I’ve tried appeals and different steps, but I still haven’t been able to recover my original account.

I just hope there can be a more transparent and fair way for users to regain access, especially when their account holds so many personal memories. I really hope to gain justice and get my account @cod.ybrendan back. I am very upset for the valuable losses I faced in the past week , and I want to talk to a human at meta to resolve and gain my disabled account.

447188370.author: C10110
447188370.title: Banned Without Reason
447188370.body:
I have been repeatedly flagged for violating sexual content warnings. I post music i make or little game projects Im working on ffs. I don’t know of someone is harassing me with false reports or what but snap offers zero assistance and has locked the account. 

I have been a user for years. I found it really helpful when I don’t want to give my personal cell or socials out but want to “post” mkre like socials. 

Well that’s over with lol. I guess it’s fine for Sophie Rain to have her ahh jiggle barely covered and for minors like Piper to be in skimpy bikinis soft launching for OF when they turn 18, but god forbid some guy wants to share a lyric video of an indie folk song he made using gameplay footage from a little top down space game he’s working on as a bg visual. 

They must protect the platform from monsters like me.

447188370.author: Gracie_F7
447188370.title: LOVE snap, but hoping for more voiceover accessibility
447188370.body:
i love snap, i use it ALL the time. i'm blind and am a voiceover user. even tho snap has gotten way more accessible with the screen reader (thank you!!) i would appreciate even more accessibility. i would love to see the story creation screen with all of the filters/lenses be in a cleaner, more organized layout. i would also appreciate for stickers etc to have proper labeled buttons. it would be cool if the in app camera could help blind ppl with framing when trying to take a pic or vid when a screen reader is enabled so the phone cam doesn't have to be sued as often. it would also be great if it was easier to upload pics/screenshots from camera roll to add captions and then post. also, i have to take screenshots of ppl's stories to see what they are and after i get the description and go back to reply, the reply button no longer shows up. but it's there before i take the screenshot. that just changed very recently unfortunately
thank you so much for taking the time to read my review and i hope you will consider ways to make the app more accessible/inclusive for blind users!

447188370.author: cxssvii
447188370.title: Lack of Support and Wrongful Perma Ban to Account/Device
447188370.body: One thing about me is i’ve used snap since i was in 5th grade. 2013. i have never gotten a warning, violated guidelines, or anything. Yet somehow about a month ago snap decided to ban me and my account for what they said was me violating their drug policy…i didn’t. apparently it is ALL AI and it can flag you if it senses slang it THINKS is related to said “violated policy” and it’s funny cause they normally don’t even tell you why. so the fact i know i didn’t do that and was also being harassed by someone in real life and online and i tried to explain the matter yet again. another AI reviews the appeal. With this being said and how deep it actually goes as i have even sent a pre arbitration notice that i know they’ll ignore since you cannot file a class-action lawsuit against them per their terms and conditions. it is impossible to get a human to respond and once i try to explain the issue it goes back to AI. i have never actually seen a SERVICE violate their own terms and agreements. yes they can ban you for whatever they want at their will. but to not even have due process and meaningful human review is ridiculous at this point with how long snapchat has been around. could actually give jobs to people who would be willing to do it even. so to do the absolute most to me when i KNOW i was reported by someone trying to mess with my life knowing i had EVERY memory from 6th grade to my first daughter and even up to the point they WRONGFULLY banned me and refuse to even acknowledge an email and DO something to help me while i KNOW the person who did this to mess with me posts the exact violation they said i broke and WORSE. DO NOT download this app thinking you can save pics either cause they’ll probably do this to you too and they want you to pay to have ur own memories anyway. snapchat has become a money hungry greedy service who only gives a chance to those already famous with a following and money and funding it with snapchat+ or SOMETHING cause i almost wonder if this is a common thing to happen to users without snap+ as anyone ik w snap+ gets away with any and everything while those of us not paying and doing nothing wrong get banned…seen it happen time and time again with people close to me. get it together snap. i haven’t been a loyal user for 13 years to not even be able to have a meaningful review and discussion regarding my account especially when snapchat was an avenue to advertise my business and make me money. so now since losing the app also i have lost access to people who buy my good and services as well as a place to market.

595068606.author: LocalTraveler
595068606.title: Used to be good, much better options available these days
595068606.body:
For many years, this was my go to app to split the dinner bill. It wasn’t always perfect, but it was the best available at the time. It’s pretty frustrating when it gets it wrong though, because when you’re at dinner with a large group of friends…trying to figure it out, there’s a lot of pressure and it just gets confusing not knowing which price it got wrong.

Thankfully, tech has improved, and now I can’t live without “fairShare - split the bill”.   It has all the bells and whistles and features you could want while still keeping the UI simple and clean. Best part is it’s always accurate and all my friends can pick their own items without downloading the app or needing a login. Easy Peezy.

it’s truly as if this app was built to
be difficult to use. it’s horrible at scanning a picture of a receipt. you have to enter in manually and it takes ages. the bills auto delete after just a couple of weeks.

595068606.author: Sirpingalot
595068606.title: Great for splitting tabs
595068606.body: Always a problem with restaurants not splitting it into too many cheques. But this app makes it a breeze. Scans your receipt so you don’t have to hand type everything and lets you pick what you ate. I’ve never tried the bank integration but splitting the bill has definitely become less of a hassle. Totally recommend if you are usually in groups that need it split.

595068606.author: aprauhl18
595068606.title: Discounts Incorrect
595068606.body:
There needs to be an option to add a percentage as a discount and not just the total of the discount itself. It’s not calculating each persons total correct because it’s splitting the discount with everyone. How would it know where the $120 discount came from? When everyone received 20% off the bill? When I do the math myself it’s not splitting or calculating correctly. The option to add a discount on the bill as a “percentage” would be very helpful. 

Same thing with adding tax. I should be able to insert the tax percentage like I can with tip instead of only being able to add the amount manually.

595068606.author: Stephen Kirby
595068606.title: Great app
595068606.body: Efficient and effective

595068606.title: Game changer!
595068606.body: Using this app on a girl’s trip made splitting the costs so easy! Unlike most similar apps, I was able to split the tabs easily, without everyone having to have an account or join the bill to claim their items. 10/10 recommend!

You might have to manually input things once in a while when the camera can’t get the whole receipt but other than that it’s a great app!

595068606.author: Romance_geek

595068606.author: JoMaMa Rocks!

595068606.author: Alex Dinnouti
595068606.title: A Must-Have for Group Dining
595068606.body:
Great app with a clear mission, a simple interface, and excellent usability. It does exactly what it needs to do.

The app accurately scans most receipts and includes an editor for the few that need manual adjustments.

You can pass your phone around so everyone can tag their items, or share a code for friends who already have the app.

There’s also a birthday feature that lets you easily include or exclude the birthday person when splitting the bill.

595068606.author: Dg-000
595068606.title: Not accurate
595068606.body: The app is convenient at times but not very accurate. I’ve tried to use it plenty of times with well lit and clear pictures and the numbers it pulls is crazy sometimes…not really worth it

595068606.author: Carlosgjm
595068606.title: Great simple app
595068606.body: Lifesaver app for going to dinner with friends. Simple UI and makes it easy to use. No problems making the checks split. Venmo integration is buggy but screenshotting works fine. Highly recommend!

595068606.author: SoCal Kman
595068606.title: It works!
595068606.body: With all the eating with different families and sports team, Tab is super easy to use. I took a picture of the receipt and it OCR and created a receipt in the app that I can just click line items. It auto added tax and I can adjust the tip amount. So easy!

595068606.author: Fishy Fishy bubbles
595068606.title: Good but glitchy
595068606.body: It’s an awesome tool when it works. The issue is it doesn’t work half the time. It will often record the date or time on the receipt as a price and throw everything off. Or sometimes it won’t scan or read items randomly in the middle of the bill. Sometimes I have to scan receipts two or three times before it starts to work.

595068606.author: Jackson00000001
595068606.title: Everything I need
595068606.body: How is this not a regular used app?? It’s amazing, adjustable, easy to use and integrates with either in-vivo pictures or pictures I’ve previously taken! I’ve had the “pleasure” of being the guy who calculates what everyone owes me and their tax and tip. This breaks it down into each person’s stuff, lets me add multiple people to the same item, and even divide an item into 3rds, 4ths, or 5ths! It’s awesome, cannot recommend it enough

686449807.author: Peaches thoughts
686449807.title: Terrible app with nothing but scammers, and illegal abuse being advertised. PLEASE PLEASE READ
686449807.body:
For one the app is full of scammers. I was in the app and another account started impersonating me- using my pictures to scam people. I contacted support and the bots, along with writing multiple emails over the span of 3 years to resolve this. The account made fake channels of me- although support never responded 2 of the channels did get deleted shortly after. But they just make another channel. The 3rd one they made- I’ve reached out about for over a year now. Still no response and this time no action. They chose to leave the whole account up- even though the profile itself was also posting my to story and mimicked my profile. And since they just leave the account up it allows them to continue making new channels. I’ve requested both to be taken down, submitted proof of who I am. Proof the account is very fake. (My Id, my full name, every social I have, and even a video of myself explaining everything.) the owners of this app
Do not care. They would rather get the 4$ monthly subscription the account pays to pretend to be me and scam normal users than delete the account. This is a very common problem on this app- I know many people currently being impersonated and telegram just does not care. If you reach out to support volunteers they never respond.  The scam bot never responds. The emails for scam and abuse do nothing. The app claims they prioritize safety and privacy and gives options to disable sharing and screen recording of the things you post.. then they have bots in the app to just bypass that to steal your posts. No
Such thing as privacy. Not only that but there is so much illegal things posted through this app. Child porn. Animal abuse. Selling dope. Arraignment of illegal things in general.. the same spam account I came across posting advertising selling child porn on their story 2 years ago and reported- and had many people go report.. IS STILL UP AND POSTING IT. The creators of this app really do not care about their users being scammed or harassed. They don’t care about their exploitation or abuse being openly exposed on this app. As long as the account is paying that 4$ monthly subscription subscription.. they will leave it up. It’s disgusting.

686449807.author: Ella Jarred
686449807.title: Paid feature just bad
686449807.body:
Allows spam even if you pay premium.

I’m in a Telegram group associated to a channel. On a daily basis (and often more than once a day) a spam bot simultaneously answers to the latest 50 channel posts with the same spam message, and the accounts used to send those messages (which inevitably flood the group) are always Premium accounts. If Premium accounts can write to you anyway, there is no reason to pay for that.
